title: Senior Teacher - Mumbai University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Mumbai University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mumbai University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Mumbai University:
Mumbai University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University!
